ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference code for the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in stock */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the component (e.g., 100uF, 1N5819RL) */,
  "footprint" INTEGER /* Footprint ID of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet */,
  "source_url" INTEGER /* Source ID where the component can be procured */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance value for the component */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Operating temperature range for the component */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., SMD, THT) */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for procurement */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the component information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., in stock, ordered, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_source_url FOREIGN KEY ("source_url") REFERENCES component_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_footprint FOREIGN KEY ("footprint") REFERENCES footprints ("footprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_reference FOREIGN KEY ("reference") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "footprints" (
  "footprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each footprint */,
  "footprint_name" TEXT /* Name of the footprint (e.g., Capacitor_THT:CP_Radial_D5.0mm_P2.00mm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the footprint */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the footprint */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Detailed dimensions of the footprint */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Number of pins in the footprint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("footprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type (e.g., Capacitor, Diode, Connector) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the component type */,
  "technical_details" TEXT /* Additional technical details about the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., RS Online) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the source */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the source */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for procurement from this source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the source (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, procurement manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, procure) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_footprints" (
  "footprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental footprint */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "carbon_emission" REAL /* Carbon emission value associated with the component */,
  "recyclability" TEXT /* Recyclability of the component */,
  "water_usage" REAL /* Water usage associated with the component */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption during production */,
  "waste_generated" REAL /* Waste generated during production */,
  "sustainability_score" REAL /* Sustainability score (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("footprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_footprints_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
